executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Execute a comprehensive QA test suite focusing on the following backend-driven workflows and metrics:

WF1 (Policy Sync): Test the full policy document upload pipeline — metadata entry (name, department), file upload (PDF/DOCX), LangGraph processing pipeline (Uploading→Analyzing→Saving states), and final Active status appearance in the policy library. Measure total API latency from upload initiation to Active state.

WF2 (Upload Receipt): Test the employee receipt submission flow — upload one or more receipt images, wait for OCR/LLM extraction to complete, verify extracted fields (vendor, amount, date, category) are returned and pre-filled in the form. Measure API response time for the full OCR LangChain agent call.

WF3 (Compliance & Fraud Trap): Test the compliance evaluation path — submit a basket of receipts where User Input values deliberately differ from OCR-extracted values (e.g., user enters a higher amount than the OCR detected). Verify the AI correctly flags the discrepancy, routes to 'Requires Attention', and does NOT auto-approve. Also test boundary limits: submit receipts that exceed policy limits and verify rejection/flagging.

Form Validation (Negative Edge Cases):
- Upload a receipt file larger than 5MB and verify rejection with an appropriate error message.
- Upload a policy file with an unsupported type (e.g., .exe or .txt) and verify rejection.
- Submit the login form with empty email and verify inline validation error.
- Submit with invalid credentials and verify auth failure banner.
- Submit the reimbursement form without required fields and verify field-level errors.

API Latency Measurement: For each of WF1, WF2, and WF3, record the wall-clock time from API call initiation to final response/state change. Report these as latency metrics in the test results.

Security: Verify unauthenticated access to /hr/dashboard redirects to login. Verify employee role cannot access HR pages.

All tests MUST be constrained to http://localhost:3000 only. Do not contact any external endpoints.
